scripts.db:tunnel: ssh -f -N -L 15432:172.18.0.4:5432 -L 15433:172.18.0.7:8080 services-vm && echo 'DB tunnels up (postgres :15432, pg-meta :15433)'
scripts.db:push: PGSSLMODE=disable supabase db push --db-url "$(grep SUPABASE_DB_URL .env.local | cut -d= -f2-)"
scripts.db:pull: PGSSLMODE=disable supabase db pull --db-url "$(grep SUPABASE_DB_URL .env.local | cut -d= -f2-)"
scripts.db:diff: PGSSLMODE=disable supabase db diff --db-url "$(grep SUPABASE_DB_URL .env.local | cut -d= -f2-)"
